feed.title: SAP Community - API Management
feed.subtitle: API Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Business process automation bpm.workflowruntime.servicetask.request.failed
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I just downloaded the SAP FIXED Asset project package using the SAP Business Process Automation and other dependent activities. But when I submitted data using AAP, I saw the error message below.

Could you please suggest what I might have done wrong?

The destination Service is shown below

Error Message

Detail Error message

"restEndpoint": { "httpMethod": "POST", "destinationName": "sap_process_automation_service", "destinationUrl": "https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com",

"relativePath": "/public/rule/runtime/rest/v2/rule-services", "destinationSubdomain": "**************************************" },

"error": { "message": "The HTTP request to 'https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/public/rule/runtime/rest/v2/rule-services' failed with status code 404 (Not Found) and response body '{\"error\":{\"code\":\"bpm.rulesruntime.version_invalid\",\"message\":\"Cannot find rule service for given rule service ID 564baff2670746898c2d97c482ac1c6d and revision 2111\",\"details\":[]}}'.",

"errorCode": "bpm.workflowruntime.servicetask.request.failed", "logId": "ee83bde1-8e0e-46e1-8a03-e1558ff-us10" }

entry.title: BTP Fixed Asset Transfers automation app giving bpmworkflowruntime "404 Not Found"
entry.content:
Hi,

I recently downloaded the Fixed Asset Project in the SAP Business Process Automation app and other dependent objects in Cloud Foundry but when I am triggering data in the app, I am getting the below error message.

Error Message

{code: "bpm.workflowruntime.rest.definition.not.found", message: "Workflow definition not found",…}

"bpm.workflowruntime.rest.definition.not.found"

  1. App in Debugging mode

Fixed Asset Aap

All artifacts for Fixed asset project in the Lobby of Business Process Automation

entry.title: Fiori List Report Language
entry.content:
I'm creating a Fiori App on BAS using a list report, and I'm using as a service c_salesordermanage_sd, entety SalesOrderManage. My app is being displayed with language EN, but I want to be PT.

Can I change a service language? How can I achive that?

Thanks,
Inês Martins

entry.title: Can not find Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0339 in system
entry.content:
Hello expert,

We can not find Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0339 when creating communication arrangement.

Overview | Change Record History | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: SAP API Management and SAP CPI Odata Adapter $metadata Issue
entry.content:
Good day,

While developing an OData API to a SuccessFactors backend the resources are exposed.

We added a policy to this API to verify the APIKey.

We can access the resources in POSTMAN.

However when using a SAP CPI odata adapter it tries to query the metadata while passing the correct APIKey, we cannot access /$metadata

We get the error:

{

"fault": {

"faultstring": "Invalid ApiKey for given resource",

"detail": {

"errorcode": "oauth.v2.InvalidApiKeyForGivenResource"

}

}

}

API Query: {{BASE_API_ENDPOINT}}/SF/ECPersonalInformation/$metadata

Has anyone experienced this before and able to resolve?

Regards,

Brandon

entry.title: Data models for S4/Hana APIs
entry.content: Hi, We are using S4/Hana APIs to read, write data to the S4/Hana database, how to find the tables used (how they are joined etc.) for each of the tables? Can't find the data models for the APIs in the documentation. Is this information available anywhere?

entry.title: API for UTILTIES CONTRACT existing or planned?
entry.content:
Hi,

we are looking for a released or planned API for UTILTIES Contract (EVER)?

We could not find the right API on https://api.sap.com/

Thanks

Till

entry.title: Anyone can help with the RBP apis for reading mdf object permissions from a Role
entry.content:
When I use RBPRole(xxxx)?$expand=permissions I get all permissions of the "xxxx" role excepting everything that relates to MDF objects permissions.

Anyone knows and API that would provide these permissions?

entry.title: Draft Table not working in RAP Web API
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to enable draft table for RAP Web API for managed scenario with additional save. We have added draft actions like ( prepare, Activate, Edit, Discard and resume). When we are doing post call via Postman, then Its triggers precheck method, and after that it populate fields with value which we passed in json and also there is draft uuid is getting created and draft table is populated. After precheck its neither calling draft actions like prepare  nor its calling our defined methods like determination etc. So we wanted to know that as our scenario is managed implementation then after precheck why framework is not calling actions like prepare, activate etc. And In what way we can save draft data to persistent table in case of web API???  

Thank You

entry.title: Request for Access to Retrieve KBA BY SAP Gateway Integration
entry.content:
Want to retrieve SAP KBA Files by Microsoft Power Platform(automate).

I've successfully integrated a demo account with SAP Gateway Demo system ,I can retrieve Products and GWSAMPLE_BASIC. and I'm now interested in programmatically accessing Knowledge-Based Articles (KBAs) related to SAP Gateway. Is there an API or a specific method. 

I can use to automate the retrieval of KBA files?.

Your guidance on this matter would be highly valuable.

entry.title: Can we give someone display access to Cloud connector
entry.content:
Hello ,

I wanted to know if we can provide developers having S user id with display access to cloud connector without using LDAP server.

Thanks.

entry.title: Policies in SAP API Management
entry.content: How to pass values in Headers as well as JSON Payload for Authentication in policies in sap api management.

entry.title: Invalidate cache on SAP APIM calls
entry.content:
Hello Community,
Good day. I have observed that the API calls are caching the user identity issues, even though they were corrected later. The issue continues to occur.

How can I handle this problem? Could you please provide me with some input on this?

Thank you very much.

 

Yours sincerely,Sateesh N

entry.title: Error while posting outbound delivery entry via API - "creating operations are disabled for entity"
entry.content:
Error while posting outbound delivery entry via API - "creating operations are disabled for entity"

Application - S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD

REST API

Whether SAP team has to give authorizations or solution partner should modify configurations?

entry.title: Generate token using authorization tab error
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an API to generate token and when executing form postman I am passing the username and password in the authorization tab and passing some grant type in body tab from postman and generating the token successfully. But when I am writing the same from ABAP it is not working. Experts, can you please suggest if I am missing something.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Issue with API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContent POST call
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to do POST call AttachmentContent

Question: Here i am converting file data to Binary and then posing to standard api API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContent,  i am able to upload file to sales order but content updated is empty. Kindly help me if anything wrong in this code.

Here is my UploadSet View and controller code

Spoiler
<upload:UploadSet
id="UploadSet"
instantUpload="false"
showIcons="true"
uploadEnabled="true"
afterItemAdded="onAfterItemAdded"
afterItemRemoved="onRemoveFile"
fileRenamed="onFileRename"
terminationEnabled="true"
maxFileNameLength="30"
maxFileSize="100"
uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet"
items="{UtilityModel>/AttachmentData}"
mode="None">
<upload:toolbar>
<OverflowToolbar id="_IDGenOverflowTolbar1">
<ToolbarSpacer id="_IDGenToolbpacer1"/>
<upload:UploadSetToolbarPlaceholder id="_IDGenUploadSetToolbarPlaceholder1" />
</OverflowToolbar>
</upload:toolbar>
<upload:items>
<upload:UploadSetItem
id="_IDGenUploadSktItem1"
fileName="{UtilityModel>FileName}"
mediaType="{UtilityModel>MimeType}"
url="/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet(DocumentInfoRecordDocType='{UtilityModel>DocumentInfoRecordDocType}',DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber='{UtilityModel>DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber}',DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion='{UtilityModel>DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion}',DocumentInfoRecordDocPart='{UtilityModel>DocumentInfoRecordDocPart}',LogicalDocument='{UtilityModel>LogicalDocument}',ArchiveDocumentID='{UtilityModel>ArchiveDocumentID}',LinkedSAPObjectKey='{UtilityModel>LinkedSAPObjectKey}',BusinessObjectTypeName='{UtilityModel>BusinessObjectTypeName}')/$value"
>
</upload:UploadSetItem>
</upload:items>
</upload:UploadSet>

 

Spoiler
onAfterItemAdded: function (oEvent) {

                var fileItem = oEvent.getParameter("item");
                var oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel("apiAttachmentService");

                // Create a Blob from the file
                var fileData = new Blob([fileItem.getFileObject()]);

                // Read the file content as an ArrayBuffer
                var buf = function getBuffer(resolve) {
                    var reader = new FileReader();
                    reader.onload = function () {
                        var arrayBuffer = reader.result;
                        resolve(arrayBuffer);
                    };
                    reader.readAsArrayBuffer(fileData);
                };

                var promise = new Promise(buf);
                promise.then(function (arrayBuffer) {
                    // Convert the ArrayBuffer to Base64
                    var binaryString = '';
                    var bytes = new Uint8Array(arrayBuffer);
                    var length = bytes.byteLength;
                    for (var i = 0; i < length; i++) {
                        binaryString += String.fromCharCode(bytes[i]);
                    }
                    var base64Data = btoa(binaryString);

                    oModel.setHeaders({
                        "LinkedSAPObjectKey": "0070000117",
                        "BusinessObjectTypeName": "BUS2096",
                        "Content-Type": fileItem.getMediaType(),
                        "Slug": fileItem.getFileName()
                    });

                    // Create a new entry in AttachmentContentSet
                    oModel.create("/AttachmentContentSet", null, {
                        "Content": base64Data
                    }, {
                        success: function (oData) {
                            debugger;
                        },
                        error: function (oError) {
                            debugger;
                        }
                    });
                    this.byId("UploadSet").upload();
                }.bind(this));
}

entry.title: Principal Propagation with API Management & On-Premise System
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to set up Principal Propagation with API Management capability of Integration Suite to an On-Premise SAP System. I am following this blog to achieve the same.

I have setup and tested the Principal Propagation between my subaccount and the backend system via Cloud Connector. It seems to work fine. 

But when I try to expose an API from the system and try to test it, it says "403 - Forbidden". I am not able to troubleshoot the issue. I followed all the steps in the blog from creating instances, service keys to adding policy templates but I am not sure what is missing.

Can someone please throw some light on this? Would highly appreciate.

@shruthiarjun

entry.title: ServiceLayer query allowlist for UDT/UDO
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

 

 

I have a problem with the allowlist from the query service layer. For example, if I want to post the following query:



{
"SqlCode": "U_CS_PROD5",
"SqlName": "U_CS_PROD5",
"SqlText": "SELECT T0.Code FROM [@CS_BDE_MAIN] T0"

}


Then I get the response:

{
"error": {
"code": 702,
"message": {
"lang": "en-us",
"value": "Table '@CS_BDE_MAIN' not accessible"
}
}
}

 

 


I defined the table in the allowlist like this:

First test:
@CS_BDE_MAIN
Second test:
[@CS_BDE_MAIN]
Third test
CS_BDE_MAIN

Afterwards I always restarted the service layer.

However, I still get the same error message.

Do you have any idea what that could be?


Thank you very much

Levin

entry.title: Return 404 when accessing ABAP API in SAP on premise
entry.content:
Hello.

Our environment is local, I developed an API, where it is possible to access it internally, but when I'm outside the company I don't receive the expected feedback, I checked the rules made in the firewall, understand that they are correct.


Below is the return I got "404 Not Found".

 

 

 

I will be grateful if someone helps me!
Neemias.

entry.title: API details needed for posting payment advice through FPAV in FI-CA
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I find below API from SAP business hub for posting payment advice, but these APIs are posting payment advice in FI module, not in FICA module.

API Reference | Payment Advice - Create | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Overview | Payment Advice (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Can someone help us to conclude if we have the API or not.

Regards.

Till

PS: Copied this question from Tech to subject group, as not replied for long.

Original Question: API details needed for posting payment advice thro... - SAP Community
